name: Chicken Breasts a La Budapest
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cut each chicken breast in half lengthwise and remove skin and bones.
3. Pat breasts dry with paper towels.
4. In a large baking dish, melt butter.
5. Arrange breast halves side by side in the dish, fleshy side down.
6. Sprinkle with salt and pepper; turn over and sprinkle other side.
7. Distribute onions and garlic evenly among and beneath breasts.
8. Stir sour cream, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and pepper in a small bowl.
9. Pour mixture over chicken breasts to cover completely.
10. Sprinkle with bread crumbs and paprika.
11. Bake for 30 minutes. Add half of the wine along the edge of the dish and bake another 20 minutes.
12. Add remaining wine along the edge of the dish and continue baking until tender (15-30 minutes).
